title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Medtronic India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Medtronic India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Medtronic India Ventures Solutions in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Medtronic India Ventures Solutions:
Medtronic India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medtronic India Ventures Solutions!
